author: Ivan Verbovoy
name: Progressive Depth + Hedge Mixer (5-expert online ensemble)
blurb: 3 unique blocks with progressive depth scheduling (2→3→4 repeats), XSA, LeakyReLU², Cross-Repeat Skip, SWA, int8+zstd22. Eval: 5-expert Hedge Mixer (neural + unigram + bigram + trigram + entropy) with online multiplicative weight updates. 5673 steps in 600s train, 579s eval on 8xH100.
